pageDesc: Buy credits for AI-powered match analysis. Each analysis costs 5 credits.
heroSub: Each match analysis costs 5 credits. Once generated, anyone can view it for free.
signInNote: Sign in to see your balance.
how1Desc: Go to a match detail page that hasn't started yet.
how2Desc: A comprehensive 11-section analysis is generated for 5 credits.
how3Desc: After the match ends, see which predictions hit or missed on the analysis page.

faqItems.q1: When will the payment system be active?
faqItems.a1: We're working on payment integration — it'll be live very soon.
faqItems.q2: Do I spend credits again if analysis already exists for a match?
faqItems.a2: No. Once an analysis is generated for a match, everyone can view it for free.
faqItems.a3: No, credits stay on your account indefinitely.
